marketing-audiences-prospects.png.note: Marketing > Audiences, Prospects tab. Orients the reader on where prospects live. Agent-captured 2026-07-17 at 1680x500 CSS clip, 2x, dom-sanitize (freshenDates:false, custom replacements for two non-NANP phone formats the stock regex missed). Pre-stripped plus-tag emails (name+123@domain) before sanitize to avoid the phone regex mis-matching the +digits suffix and corrupting the email. Hid the unselected 'Staging Test Brand' pill and three test-artifact rows (Max Testing22, testing invalid fields, Testing New) via page.evaluate display:none -- no fabricated data, just seed-data blemish cleanup. No cursor -- read-only orientation state.

convert-action-dropdown.png.note: SUPERSEDED by convert-action-dropdown-v2.png (2026-07-17 reshoot) -- this raw showed the staging-only 'Knowledge Base' sidebar item, which is never present in production. Marketing > Audiences, Prospects tab, two rows selected via checkboxes, bulk toolbar's More dropdown open showing Convert (2) / Validate Emails (2) / Delete (2). Illustrates the manual conversion step (Convert action) described in the article. Agent-captured 2026-07-17, viewport shrunk to 1680x650 CSS after opening the dropdown so the fixed-bottom toolbar sits close to the table (less dead space), 2x, dom-sanitize (freshenDates:false, same phone replacements as the other Audiences shot). Cursor points at the 'More' toolbar button.

convert-action-dropdown-v2.png.note: Reshoot of convert-action-dropdown.png (2026-07-17) -- fixes the staging-only 'Knowledge Base' sidebar item being visible (hidden via DOM fix; not present in production). Same UI state: Marketing > Audiences, Prospects tab (View All brand context), two rows selected (Billy Smith, Joshua Radin-Grant) via checkboxes, bulk toolbar's More dropdown open showing Convert (2) / Validate Emails (2) / Delete (2). Agent-captured at 1680x650 CSS, 2x, dom-sanitize (freshenDates:false, pre-stripped +tag emails before sanitize, custom replacements for the two non-NANP phone formats the stock regex misses). Also hid the multi-brand picker row (contains 'Staging Test Brand') and the three test-artifact rows (Max Testing22, testing invalid fields, Testing New) to match the sibling orientation shot. Raw pixel dimensions (3360x1300) and final processed dimensions (1800x765) match the original exactly; cursor coordinate [2225,1178] (More button) reused verbatim and verified to land correctly.
